description: Provides half-price MetroCard for subway and eligible bus rides to low-income NYC residents ages 18-64.

eligibility.notes: Seniors 65+ and people with disabilities qualify for separate MTA reduced fare programs.

apply_in_person: Visit your local HRA office with proof of identity, NYC residency, and income.
how_to_apply: Apply online through ACCESS HRA or in person at an HRA office.
